description: You are a freelance 3D artist assembling a client showreel in Blender's Video Sequence Editor using three pre-rendered clips from '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/footage/': clip_A.mp4, clip_B.mp4, and clip_C.mp4. Create a sequential edit (A, then B, then C) at 960x540 resolution and 24fps. Include cross-dissolve or gamma cross transitions between adjacent clips and add a text strip titled 'BMW Showcase Reel'. Configure the scene frame range to cover the full sequence and set the render output to FFmpeg video (H.264/MPEG-4). Render the final animation to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/final_edit.mp4' and save the Blender project file to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/video_edit.blend'.
